ingredients: 1/2 lb medium shrimp, peeled, deveined and cut into pieces
steps: Whisk eggs with a pinch of salt. Cook as a thin omelet in 1 tbsp oil, then slice into strips.
Mix soy sauce, sesame oil and 1 tbsp water; set aside.
Heat remaining 1 tbsp oil on high. Stir-fry shrimp with ginger until almost cooked, about 2 minutes.
Add snow peas, carrots and scallions; stir-fry 1 minute.
Add rice and soy mixture; stir-fry until hot. Stir in egg strips and serve.
tips: Use cold, day-old rice for best texture; keep heat high and work quickly so the rice fries rather than steams.
